findings.message: Justia blocked direct CLI/Playwright extraction with Cloudflare verification; Google Patents was accessible through Playwright Chromium. Fixture remains advisory and is not added to the deterministic CI index.
The skill correctly flags the old computer-readable-medium claim as not automatically equivalent to modern non-transitory CRM support.

proposed_skill_changes: Keep a regression example requiring the software-patent skill to distinguish old computer-readable-medium language from modern non-transitory CRM support.
